title: Handling a Supplier Change Notification
alt: Five-step process for triaging and closing a supplier change notification

items.label: Acknowledge & log
items.desc: Confirm receipt and record with a unique reference

items.label: Classify the change
items.desc: Minor, major or critical against pre-agreed criteria

items.label: Assess impact
items.desc: On MA, GMP/GDP status, validation, stability, specs

items.label: Decide
items.desc: Approve, approve with conditions, request data or reject

items.label: Define actions
items.desc: Owners, due dates, re-qualification, testing, variation
